title: Spires
content:
Spires of Grace Church,
    For you the workers of the world
    Travailed with the mountains...
    Aborting their own dreams
    Till the dream of you arose - 
    Beautiful, swaddled in stone - 
    Scorning their hands.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lola Ridge, titled "Spires", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
